$schema-note: Counts-only baseline for scripts/check-knip-baseline.ts. Each key maps to the per-file array name in knip --reporter json. CI fails if any current count exceeds the matching baseline. Update procedure: docs/runbooks/ci.md §6.
capturedFromCommit: Post-dependabot PR #58 (45-package bump) + knip 6.3→6.13 upgrade. Exports 43→47: 4 newly-detected unused UI component re-exports (SelectScrollDownButton, SelectScrollUpButton, PopoverHeader, PopoverDescription etc.) surfaced by knip 6.13's improved analysis. Types 15→34: 19 newly-detected unused type exports across bid, intelligence, MCP formatter, and coverage modules — all pre-existing project types now flagged by the upgraded knip + updated TypeScript package graph. Unlisted 3→2: one unlisted dependency resolved by the bump. No new code authored; baseline raised to absorb the upgraded tooling's broader detection surface.
